---
title: "Juliania, or, The Affectionate Sisters"
---

## Juliania, or, The Affectionate Sisters

**Author:** Elizabeth Sandham
**Date:** 1803
**Imprint:** London: Hurst

### Notes

This children\'s book includes a story called \'The Fortunate Geese\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
